name: DiggerSim - Excavator & Heavy Equipment Simulator VR

reviews.review_description: Controls Ain't right you only get 1 piece of equipment

The controls are not great. I actually can’t really use my hands like I would in a real machine. I use the joysticks on the controllers instead which works better but it’s sad that the be sticks don’t work well like you’d expect. The sticks for driving the tracks didn’t really work at all for me and I can’t turn. Game is basically unplayable. The reason it gets 2 stars is DIG vr isn’t out yet and this one is still kinda cool. I think this game should be updated to work properly, and I want to be able to switch the controls so it works like the excavators I’ve driven. More vehicles would be great too. Also, I’d like to sit to the side, for viability, instead of directly behind the arm so close yet so far from perfect

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! We’ve fixed the VR control issues and joystick responsiveness to make the experience smoother and more realistic.

reviews.review_description: I am glad that they have a digger sim developed (somewhat). I was very frustrated with the controls. My hands kept coming off the control levers which was extremely frustrating.  It makes it very unusable. I have it 2 stars only because of it being developed and the graphics are decent. Controlling the equipment is definitely a fail.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’ve resolved the control issues, including the hand alignment on the levers, to improve usability and realism.

reviews.review_description: It would lag out. The controls were horrible. It was very buggy

reviews.review_title: It’s good….  but I thought it was a sim
reviews.review_description: I was SO excited for this to come out and then….From someone that has operated these machines it’s close but it has a long way to go. For instance- there are two ways to control these machines. You have one. You cant put the jacks down! But it’s the small things: the bucket: rocks just come out of the bottom of it. The ground is like concrete, there’s no throttle, etc. I just got it a few hours ago and I’m ready for some updates or teach me to code in VR
I love this game, I drive backhoes and other such diggers and this simulator is almost just like it,5stars￼
